---
title: "Hi, I'm Lucas"
pagetitle: "Lucas Watson"
description-meta: "Lucas Watson is a Ph.D. student at Kansas State University studying dynamic human decision-making from a behavioral and ecological perspective."
title-block-banner: "#cdd99a"
format:
  html:
    quarto-template-params:
      banner-header-class: "home"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-4}

```{=html}
<div class="grid" style="--bs-columns: 5; row-gap: 0;">
  <div class="g-col-1 g-col-sm-0"></div>
  <div class="g-col-3 g-col-sm-5">
    <picture>
      <source media="(max-width: 576px)" srcset="files/photos/profile_photo_square.jpeg">
      <source media="(min-width: 576px)" srcset="files/photos/profile_photo.jpeg">
      <img class="img-fluid" src="files/photos/profile_photo.jpeg" alt="{{< meta author-meta >}}">
    </picture>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-1 g-col-sm-0"></div>
</div>
```

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-8}

I'm currently a third year Ph.D. student at Kansas State University, and I make and play video games to investigate human cognition. I structure my games similar to real-world environments of animals and study how human players learn to maximize their performance through strategies. I hope to enhance decision-making research by making studies more ecologically valid for researchers and engaging for participants. Through careful planning and analysis, I hope to not completely mislead myself along the way! 

:::

:::
